response: The March cohort’s onboarding satisfaction has declined to 7.2/10 from 8.1, with high marks for the buddy system (9.1/10) and timely IT support but confusion over benefits deadlines, tools access delays of 3–5 days, and no culture handbook received. Lisa’s priority is to fix tools access processes to meet the one-day target, clarify benefits deadline communications, and ensure the culture handbook is distributed.
